title: How Doth The Little Crocodile
content:
How doth the little crocodile
Improve his shining tail,
And pour the waters of the Nile
On every golden scale!

How cheerfully he seems to grin
How neatly spreads his claws,
And welcomes little fishes in,
With gently smiling jaws!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Lewis Carroll delivers a powerful performance in "How Doth The Little Crocodile"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
